Judge Pro Tem Michael Lieberman, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, Dept. 525:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Gregory H. Pruitt, appears in Pro Per; Respondent, Joel Black, appears in Pro Per. Parties and witness, previously sworn, testify in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge.
